ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the country (e.g., Developing, Developed) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region to which the country belongs */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent to which the country belongs */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the country's data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., WHO, UN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy */,
  "adult_mortality" INTEGER /* Adult mortality rate */,
  "infant_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of infant deaths */,
  "alcohol_consumption" REAL /* Average alcohol consumption */,
  "percentage_expenditure" REAL /* Percentage of expenditure on healthcare */,
  "hepatitis_b" REAL /* Hepatitis B immunization coverage */,
  "measles" INTEGER /* Number of measles cases */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Average Body Mass Index (BMI) */,
  "under_five_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths in children under five */,
  "polio" INTEGER /* Polio immunization coverage */,
  "total_expenditure" REAL /* Total healthcare expenditure */,
  "diphtheria" INTEGER /* Diphtheria immunization coverage */,
  "hiv_aids" REAL /* HIV/AIDS prevalence */,
  "income_composition" REAL /* Income composition of resources */,
  "schooling" REAL /* Average years of schooling */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "malaria_incidence" INTEGER /* Number of malaria cases */,
  "tuberculosis_incidence" INTEGER /* Number of tuberculosis cases */,
  "diabetes_prevalence" REAL /* Percentage of the population with diabetes */,
  "cancer_incidence" INTEGER /* Number of cancer cases */,
  "heart_disease_incidence" INTEGER /* Number of heart disease cases */,
  "mental_health_prevalence" REAL /* Percentage of the population with mental health issues */,
  "smoking_prevalence" REAL /* Percentage of the population that smokes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "thinness_1_19_years" REAL /* Percentage of thinness in the 1-19 years age group */,
  "thinness_5_9_years" REAL /* Percentage of thinness in the 5-9 years age group */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object or array to store the age distribution of the population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object or array to store the gender distribution of the population */,
  "urban_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "rural_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in rural areas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "hepatitis_b_coverage" REAL /* Hepatitis B vaccination coverage */,
  "polio_coverage" INTEGER /* Polio vaccination coverage */,
  "diphtheria_coverage" INTEGER /* Diphtheria vaccination coverage */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "covid19_vaccination_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated against COVID-19 */,
  "flu_vaccination_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated against influenza */,
  "hpv_vaccination_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated against HPV */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_expenditure" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare expenditure data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "percentage_expenditure" REAL /* Percentage of healthcare expenditure */,
  "total_expenditure" REAL /* Total healthcare expenditure */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "private_expenditure" REAL /* Total private healthcare expenditure */,
  "public_expenditure" REAL /* Total public healthcare expenditure */,
  "out_of_pocket_expenditure" REAL /* Out-of-pocket healthcare expenditure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_expenditure_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device or browser used to access the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., health, demographic, vaccination) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES health_data ("data_id")
)
